targets.query:
from(bucket: "${INFLUX_BUCKET}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transaction_events" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.eventType, set: ${eventType:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["eventType"])

from(bucket: "${INFLUX_BUCKET}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transaction_events" and r._field == "count")
  |> group(columns: ["eventType"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()

from(bucket: "${INFLUX_BUCKET}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transaction_events" and r._field == "count")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "${INFLUX_BUCKET}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "transaction_events" and r._field == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.eventType =~ /(?i)(fail|revers)/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["eventType"])
